page_title: CR Neon Genesis Evangelion 〜The Beginning of the End〜 Chapter of the Last Capture
text:
is a guidebook for CR Neon Genesis Evangelion 〜The Beginning of the End〜 by Kasakura Publishing released on 01 July 2009.

Overview

The book is a guidebook for the CR Neon Genesis Evangelion 〜The Beginning of the End〜 pachinko machine.
